summary: Commission Calculator feature testing completed successfully. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly. All 9 backend tests pass. Commission calculator displays correctly in FoodStoreDashboard overview, Add Product Modal, and product list.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission calculator implementation is complete and well-designed
Food seller commission API (/api/food/my-store/commission) returns all expected fields
Product seller commission API (/api/seller/commission) works correctly for sellers
Commission calculator in ProductModal shows: selling price, commission (rate + amount), net profit
Net profit calculation is mathematically correct (price * (1 - commission_rate))
Product list displays net profit for each product (صافي ربحك)
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test seller with food store
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission Calculator feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) GET /api/food/my-store/commission returns store_type, commission_rate (0.20 for restaurants), commission_percentage (20%), total_sales, total_commission_paid, total_earnings, orders_count. 2) GET /api/seller/commission returns category-based commission rates for product sellers. 3) FoodStoreDashboard shows commission card with 20% rate and example calculation. 4) Add Product Modal shows dynamic commission calculator when price > 0: selling price, commission deduction in red, net profit in green. 5) Product list shows صافي ربحك (net profit) for each product.
